---
title: "Sequoia Marx"
image: Sequoiamarx.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: marquee
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/sequoia-a-marx
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/samarx27
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:sequoiamarx@ucsb.edu
---

I am a third year Environmental Studies major at the University of California, Santa Barbara. I am currently serving as the Garden Operations Coordinator for the Methodist Community Garden. I also work for the LEAF lab and the Aquatic Invertebrate Lab with the Cheadle Center.
